subject: Re: Warp 1.0.9 Crash
body:
Hi Shyamal,

I haven't seen this line fail before. Can you share the <CTF></CTF> section 
from the previous.settings file in that folder? Also, the usual annoying 
question: What happened between the time it worked and now? :-)

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Thursday, August 13, 2020 at 9:47:10 AM UTC+2, shyamal mosalaganti wrote:
>
> Hi Dimitry & others,
>
> After i have imported my tilts (each tilt is is motion corrected  average 
> in .mrc format) i get the following error (attached). 
> I had successfully run this dataset before without any problems. However, 
> now it just continuously crashes. 
> Any idea why this might be happening? 
>
> Thank you very much in advance,
> Shyamal
>
